chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1573 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 17.01.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Panhwar, Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General along with ASI Muhammad Bakhsh Khoso of Police Station Naushahro Feroze and ASI Mazhar Ali of Police Station Malir City-Karachi..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Written statements are filed on behalf of respondents No.2 & 4 (S.P. Naushahro Feroze and S.H.O. Police Station Naushahro Feroze respectively), which are taken on record. As per said written statements, respondent No.7 namely Abdul Hameed Khoso got an F.I.R. lodged bearing No.710 of 2022 under Sections 496-A, 34, P.P.C. at Police Station Malir City-Karachi against petitioner No.2 and others for alleged abduction and nikah over nikah with his wife Mst. Tahmeena, the petitioner No.1. A.S.I. Mazhar Ali, Investigation Officer of Police Station Malir City-Karachi is present and he files his statement as well as statement of S.H.O. Police Station Malir City-Karachi, so also copy of the statement of petitioner No.1 recorded under Section 161, Cr.P.C, which reflects that petitioner No.1 is residing with her family and she has not been kidnapped by anyone. Investigation Officer states that he would file copy of this statement along with his final report under Section 173, Cr.P.C. for disposal of the case under ‘C’ class. Learned Counsel for the petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of Investigation Officer, does not press this petition further, which stands disposed of.

Investigation Officer states that he would file copy of this statement along with his final report under Section 173, Cr.P.C. for disposal of the case under ‘C’ class. Learned Counsel for the petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of Investigation Officer, does not press this petition further, which stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
